home.title: Amlifo
home.subtitle: Your personal guitar companion
home.metronomeDesc: Train your rhythm with adjustable BPM and visual indicator
home.tunerDesc: Tune your guitar via microphone — precise note and cent detection

instrument.trainingWarning: Training currently supports 6-string instruments only. Switch to a 6-string guitar in the instrument selector.

meta.homeDesc: Metronome, tuner and chord training for guitarists. Free online tools for playing guitar.
meta.metronomeDesc: Free online metronome for guitarists. Adjustable BPM, visual indicator, timer.
meta.tunerDesc: Tune your guitar via microphone. Precise note and cent detection. Free online tuner.
meta.trainDesc: Guess and play guitar chords. Ear and technique training. Free.
